name: Kindergarten Animal Care & Horsemanship — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for animal needs, gentle observation, and safe boundaries. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with animal needs, gentle observation, and safe boundaries.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.
